youtube.description:
If any fellow larpers would like a sub just leave a comment!

Email for SUPER SERIOUS (Kidding) inquiries only - SkyDoesLarpcraft@gmail.com

HELLO RECRUITS! WELCOME TO THE SKY ARMY! Sky here!

and welcome to my channel filled with randomness, from mod reviews to let's plays to even animations and comedy skits this channel is the place to be for your Minecraft fix!

Background made by BonkersBonker (I couldn't find an account to link here if you find one email me)

IMPORTANT NOTICE: SkyDoesMinecraft turned out to be a BAD guy. I do not condone, I actively condemn him for what he turned out to be and what he did to his SO. This channel is meant to cherish the memories we all have and the joy Sky gave to us, not to praise the man.

latestvideo.title: Larpcraft: Island of the Skies (PrestonLarpz, dumbest man alive?)
